evals.prompt: Run an SEO audit on public/index.html using the browser (zuvo:seo-audit --live-url). Point it at the local file. Report the SEO gaps and the grade.
evals.expected_output: The audit catches the missing critical SEO elements in public/index.html: there is no <title> tag, no <meta name="description">, no <link rel="canonical">, no Open Graph tags (og:title/og:description/og:image), and no JSON-LD structured data; the page also has two <h1> elements. Each gap is cited at its file:line / DOM location. Because critical meta (title/description) is absent, the page gets a failing SEO grade. The audit writes its report to zuvo/audits/ and modifies no source file.
assertions: The audit records a missing-<title> finding and a missing meta-description finding against public/index.html, citing their file:line / absence in the document head.
The audit records the missing canonical link, the missing Open Graph tags, and/or the missing JSON-LD structured data in public/index.html, and it notes the duplicate <h1> (two h1 elements).
The audit records a failing SEO grade driven by the missing critical meta (title/description), and writes an seo-audit report to zuvo/audits/ without modifying any source file.

fixtures.content:
Welcome

We sell artisanal coffee beans sourced from small farms.

Our Beans

Single-origin, small-batch roasted.

evals.prompt: Run an SEO audit on public/index.html using the browser (zuvo:seo-audit --live-url). Point it at the local file. Tell me if the SEO meta is complete.
evals.expected_output: The audit shows discipline: it does NOT flag a missing <title> (present, ~60 chars), does NOT flag a missing meta description (present, ~155 chars), does NOT flag a missing canonical (present), does NOT flag missing Open Graph tags (og:title/description/image/type all present), and does NOT flag missing structured data (a JSON-LD Product schema is present). The page has a single <h1> and <html lang="en">. It records the SEO meta as complete and writes its report to zuvo/audits/, modifying no source file — no fabricated missing-tag finding.
assertions: The audit records no missing-<title> and no missing meta-description finding against public/index.html — both a <title> and a <meta name="description"> are present.

The audit records no missing-canonical, no missing Open Graph, and no missing structured-data finding — public/index.html has <link rel="canonical">, og:title/description/image tags, and a JSON-LD schema block.

The audit records the page's critical SEO meta (title, description, canonical, Open Graph, structured data) as present — no missing-critical-tag finding — and writes an seo-audit report to zuvo/audits/ without modifying any source file.

fixtures.content:
